allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from metar_monitor.app import MetarMonitorApp; from metar_monitor.__main__ import parse_args; print\('All imports OK'\)")

Bash(curl -sS -w '\\n  HTTP Status: %{http_code}\\n' -m 10 -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' 'https://www.liveatc.net/flash2/playlist.php?mount=__TRACKED_VAR__')

Bash(curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "HTTP Status: %{http_code}\\nContent-Type: %{content_type}\\nSize: %{size_download} bytes\\n" -m 10 -H "Icy-MetaData: 1" -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\)" "http://d.liveatc.net/ltac")
Bash(curl -sS -m 10 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.liveatc.net/hlisten.php?mount=ltac")
